description: Multiple directory traversal vulnerabilities in TeamCal Pro 3.1.000 and earlier allow remote attackers to include and execute arbitrary local files via a .. (dot dot) in the lang parameter to (1) index.php, (2) register.php, (3) login.php, or (4) statistics.php.
